data.title: 1911 Gold offers C$13 million private placement with Haywood Securities Inc., selling common shares at various prices.
data.description: 1911 Gold Corporation has partnered with Haywood Securities Inc. for a private placement offering, where they will sell common shares at different prices: C$0.45 per LIFE Non-FT Share, C$0.64 per CEE Offered Share, and C$0.554 per CDE Offered Share. The goal is to raise up to C$10,238,000 for the company. Haywood will act as the lead agent and sole bookrunner in this agreement.

data.title: Valero Energy Corp elects Robert L. Reymond to Board of Directors, an independent director joining Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee.
data.description: San Antonio-based Valero Energy Corporation revealed the appointment of Robert L. Reymond as an independent director to their board of directors. Reymond, formerly the Chief Operating Officer of the Energy Group and a board member at Burns & McDonnell, Inc., has joined the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. This move is effective immediately, as announced by Valero (NYSE: VLO).
Bullard Says It Would Be Unwise to Drop the 2% Inflation Goal

data.title: SKF opens Super-precision bearing facility in Airasca, Italy, the new global center of excellence.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on September 19, 2025, the SKF Super-precision centre in Airasca, Italy was officially opened. This state-of-the-art facility is highly automated and features a digitally connected environment, establishing it as SKF's premier global hub for Super-precision bearings. The inauguration marks a significant milestone for the company, as this center of excellence encompasses all essential components, showcasing SKF's commitment to innovation and precision engineering on a worldwide scale.

data.title: Record 14.3M BTC illiquid as big investors buy. 72% of circulating BTC illiquid, easing selling pressure on exchanges.
data.description: More than 72% of the Bitcoin (BTC) in circulation is currently classified as illiquid, indicating a decrease in selling pressure and a consistent decline in the supply of Bitcoin on crypto exchanges.

data.title: Bank of Italy urges stricter regulations on global stablecoins to safeguard EU financial stability, limited to compliant jurisdictions.
data.description: The vice director of the Bank of Italy has cautioned about the potential risks to EU financial stability posed by stablecoins with multiple issuers. It has been advised that these stablecoins should only be allowed in jurisdictions that have equivalent regulations.

data.title: Trade school enrollments to rise due to Gen Z, report by Validated Insights shows. Alternative providers see biggest gains.
data.description: A recent report from Validated Insights in Chicago reveals that trade school enrollments are on the rise, thanks to the influence of Gen Z. The study indicates a significant increase in enrollment numbers, particularly from younger individuals seeking alternative educational paths. This trend suggests a shifting preference towards vocational training and specialized skills development among the younger generation.

data.title: World Liberty, supported by Trump, plans to boost value for WLFI tokenholders through buybacks and burns, aiming to generate revenue for the protocol.
data.description: The proposal aims to enhance value for holders of the long-term WLFI tokens by investigating alternative revenue streams for token buybacks.

data.title: TopBuild Corp. will host an Investor Day on Dec. 9, 2025, in NYC, starting at 8:00 a.m. ET. (NYSE: BLD)
data.description: TopBuild Corp., a prominent installer of insulation and commercial roofing, along with being a specialty distributor of related building material products in the US and Canada, is set to have an Investor Day on December 9, 2025, in New York City. The event will commence at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. TopBuild Corp., listed on the NYSE as BLD, holds a significant position in the construction industry and is recognized for its comprehensive range of services and products in insulation and roofing. This Investor Day represents an essential opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the company's strategies and future outlooks.
FG Nexus increases ETH holdings to almost 50k units.

data.title: Daniel Desjardins, Senior Director at Bombardier, granted Donald M. Stuart award by RIMS for contributions to risk management.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Montreal, Daniel Desjardins, Senior Director of Global Risk Management and Insurance at Bombardier, received the Donald M. Stuart award from the Risk and Insurance Management Society (RIMS). This prestigious award is Canada’s top honor in the risk management sector. Desjardins' contributions have significantly influenced the risk management and insurance strategies at Bombardier, playing a vital role in the company's direction. The award acknowledges his profound impact on shaping the risk management landscape, reflecting his valuable dedication to the field.

data.title: SL Green Realty Corp. declares $0.2575 monthly dividend per share, equivalent to $3.09 annualized, to be paid on Oct 15.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, SL Green Realty Corp, the largest office landlord in Manhattan, declared a monthly ordinary dividend of $0.2575 per common stock share, equating to an annualized $3.09 per share. The dividend will be paid on October 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of September 30, 2025.

data.title: M/I Homes extends credit facility to $900M and maturity to 2030, from $650M. NYSE: MHO.
data.description: A housing company headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, revealed on September 19, 2025, that M/I Homes, Inc. (NYSE: MHO) has updated its credit agreement. The changes include a boost in borrowing capacity from $650 million to $900 million and an extension of the maturity date to September 2030. No other details were provided regarding the amendment.
